Miracle-Gro Plant Food Granules Ericaceous video Merchant video Previous page Ericaceous formula for acid-loving plants Feed your ericaceous plants the nutrients they need to grow twice as big (versus unfed plants)! Unique blend of 6 nutrients The perfect blend of 6 nutrients and minerals that ensure your plants grow beautiful and bountiful. Feeds plants for up to 6 months Our ‘smart feed’ system releases food only when needed. One feed lasts the whole season. Pet and child friendly Suitable for use as directed in areas where children and pets have access. Next page 1 Ericaceous Formula 2 Blend Of 6 Nutrients 3 Feeds For Up To 6 Months 4 Pet & Child Friendly Feeds your ericaceous plants for the entire season with just one application Miracle-Gro Plant Food Granules - Azalea Camellia Rhododendron is ideal for all acid-loving (ericaceous) plants. No need for constant feeds! Just one application in spring works continuously for 6 months through to the end of the growing season. Specially developed temperature-controlled coating regulates the release of nutrients to when conditions are right for feeding. A blend of essential nutrients to ensure strong, healthy plants all season long. Why should I use Miracle-Gro Plant Food Granules - Azalea Camellia Rhododendron? Plants need more than just water, they need the right balance of essential nutrients to grow and bloom their best. Miracle-Gro feeds your plants the nutrients they need that are ​easily absorbed to grow your plants twice as big versus unfed plants! Where can I use Miracle-Gro Plant Food Granules - Azalea Camellia Rhododendron? Miracle-Gro Miracle-Gro Plant Food Granules - Azalea Camellia Rhododendron is ideal for all ericaceous (acid-loving, lime-hating) plants. Perfect for use on ericaceous plants in pots and containers, beds and borders. When should I use Miracle-Gro Plant Food Granules - Azalea Camellia Rhododendron? Only one application required for the entire year. For outdoor plants, use between March and September, when plants are actively growing. For indoor plants, can be used at any time of the year when plants are actively growing. How do I use Miracle-Gro Plant Food Granules - Azalea Camellia Rhododendron? Evenly scatter granules over the compost or soil around your plants following the recommended dosage for plant type on label. Gently work the granules into the soil or mix thoroughly into compost. Water plants as normal. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: This product is a powder type and should be handled with care. Use protective equipment, such as masks and gloves, during application. Do not ingest or allow the product to come into contact with skin or eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. In case of accidental ingestion, seek medical advice. Apply away from water sources to minimize environmental impact. Always follow manufacturer instructions for proper use and storage.
